windows.embed_text_v2: pouring leftover melted wax from glass measuring vessel into purple wax glass jar candle, topping up, centered wick, blue silicone holder, paper towels, wood table
windows.summary_v2: A maker tops up a purple jar candle by pouring leftover melted wax from a glass vessel, then sets the vessel aside.

tags_v2.action: pouring extra wax into jar candle

seconds_v2.desc: A hand grips a glass pouring vessel in a blue silicone sleeve, tipping leftover wax toward a glass jar that already holds bright purple wax with a centered wick, on paper towels over a wood table.
The glass vessel tilts further over the jar, a thin stream of clear melted wax starting to pour into the purple wax surface.
Melted wax pours from the angled glass vessel into the jar, blending into the purple wax around the wick.
Higher angle: the vessel is lifted away and set behind the jar, the purple wax surface now topped up and glossy with the wick standing centered.
The glass pouring vessel rests upright behind the jar; the bright purple jar candle sits in front with its wick centered.
A bare hand reaches to steady the upright glass vessel behind the filled purple jar candle.
Hand adjusts the vessel; the purple jar candle's surface is settled and smooth with the centered wick.
The hand withdraws; the glass vessel with a little remaining wax stands beside the finished purple jar candle.
A pale blue object enters at top as the purple jar candle and the near-empty glass vessel sit on the paper-towel-covered table.

windows.summary_v2: Three cured pastel soy candles (pink, green, lavender) rest in glass jars with skewers steadying the wicks while a hand checks the pink candle's surface for firmness.

seconds_v2.desc: Three solidified soy candles in glass jars sit on white paper towels on a grey wood surface; pink, green, and lavender wax, each with a bamboo skewer laid across the top holding the wick centered.
Same three pastel candles at rest, fully set; the pink, green and purple wax surfaces are smooth and the skewers span each jar's mouth to keep the wicks upright.
Static shot of the three cured candles (pink, green, lavender) in their jars with bamboo skewers across the rims.
The three jarred candles continue setting, wax solid and even, skewers steadying the wicks.
Unchanged view of pink, green and purple solidified candles in glass jars on paper towels.
Three finished pastel candles at rest, wicks held centered by skewers laid over the jar openings.
Same three cured candles in jars; the green centre candle's surface looks slightly textured as it has set.
A hand with painted purple nails reaches in from the left and touches the surface of the pink candle to check it, the other two candles still set with skewers across them.
The hand presses a fingertip onto the pink candle's wax to test firmness, green and lavender candles beside it still resting with skewers over the rims.

windows.embed_text_v2: Finished decorated jar candle gift set displayed, pink green lavender wax in lidded glass jars, twine bows, round scent tags, Live Laugh Love lettering, wooden tray, whitewashed wood backdrop product shot
windows.summary_v2: A styled product reveal of three finished, decorated lidded jar candles (pink, green, lavender) lettered Live/Laugh/Love with scent tags and twine, displayed in a wooden tray.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: Stinkin Cute Productions; Live; Laugh; Love; Peach; Coconut Lime; Lavender

seconds_v2.desc: Three finished decorated jar candles in a wooden tray against a whitewashed wood backdrop: pink, green and lavender wax in clear jars with glass lids, each tagged with a round scent label and twine, fronts lettered 'Live', 'Laugh', 'Love'.
Same styled product shot of the three completed candles in the wooden tray; round kraft tags read scents (Peach, Coconut Lime, Lavender) and the jars show 'Live', 'Laugh', 'Love' on the glass.
Static display of the trio of finished candles with lids on, scent tags and bakers' twine, sitting in the rustic wooden box.
Unchanged styled shot of the three pastel lidded jar candles arranged as a finished gift set in the wood tray.
Closer styled view of the three completed candles; jars lettered 'Live', 'Laugh', 'Love' with twine bows and round scent tags, lids on, in the wooden tray.
The finished pink, green and lavender lidded candles sit side by side in the tray, decorative twine and tags visible, as a product reveal.
Same close product display of the three styled, lidded jar candles with lettering and tags in the wooden box.
Static beauty shot of the completed trio of pastel candles, lids and decorative twine in place, in the rustic tray.
Final styled view of the three finished decorated candles ('Live', 'Laugh', 'Love') presented as a gift set in the wooden tray.

seconds_v2.desc: Styled product shot of three finished lidded jar candles (pink 'Live', green 'Laugh', lavender 'Love') in a wooden tray against whitewashed wood, each with a round scent tag and twine bow.
Same beauty shot of the trio of completed candles with glass lids, scent tags and bakers' twine in the rustic wooden box.
Unchanged display of the three decorated pastel candles in the wooden tray as a finished gift set.
Wider styled shot now including a coil wick trimmer and a metal candle snuffer lying in front of the tray of three finished labeled candles; tags read 'Beach Rose', 'Coconut Lime', 'Lavender Fields'.
Product display of the three completed candles with lids, scent tags and twine, wick trimmer and snuffer propped in the foreground.
Same finished-candle beauty shot with snuffer and trimmer accessories beside the wooden tray.
Static display of the trio of decorated jar candles plus snuffer and wick trimmer as a styled product scene.
Cut to an end-card title screen reading 'The Crafted Life...' in white script over a black-and-white gingham background.

A YouTube end-screen card appears: a woman with glasses waving at the camera between 'EXPECTATION' and 'REALITY' thumbnails under the title 'I MADE THE MICHAELS' ELEPHANT SCULPTURE!?', framed by the gingham outro.
